header.description: Static and dynamic invoice metadata including company info, client details, and invoice dates.

rows.description: Line items detailing services/products, quantities, rates, and totals.

totals.description: Aggregated financial totals for the invoice.

semantics: Scalars are pulled from the `invoices` and `customers` tables for a specific invoice. Row tokens represent the line items joined via `invoice_number`. Totals are pre-calculated in the `invoices` table but can be re-validated via row aggregation if needed.
transformations: Join invoices to invoice_items on invoice_number.
Format issue_date and due_date to dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS.
Apply currency formatting to monetary fields.
Apply number formatting to quantities and rates.
